articles.title: Colombia vs Uzbekistan: Luis Diaz's FIFA World Cup debut arrives three years after his parents' kidnapping ordeal
articles.description: Luis Díaz made his World Cup debut for Colombia against Uzbekistan at Estadio Azteca, a moment shadowed by what his family endured less than three years earlier. In October 2023, his parents were kidnapped in Barrancas, Colombia. His mother was freed within hours, but his father was held by the ELN for nearly two weeks before being released through UN and Church-brokered negotiations. Díaz publicly pleaded for his father's freedom during that time, including lifting his shirt after a goal to reveal a message asking for his release.
